payload.answer: I can’t remember this article as durable memory because the fetch failed with a 404/network error and no article content was provided. I won’t infer or invent claims about the article.

entity_resolution.reason: The requested article URL could not be fetched; the input only provides a malformed/ambiguous URL-like string and a mock 404 network error, so no durable article content can be verified.

details: Article content was unavailable, so source claims could not be verified.

repair_options: Paste the article text or a summary to remember.
Clarify whether the URL was intended to be https://example.com/missing and provide accessible content.
